localValidationScope.documentedReason: No live hosted friends-and-family beta URL or beta auth token is available in local CI. The proof generator remains fail-closed and must be rerun with BOTOMATIC_BETA_BASE_URL, BOTOMATIC_BETA_AUTH_TOKEN, and BOTOMATIC_BETA_PROJECT_ID to create a passing hosted-beta HTTP proof.

beta_environment_manifest_present.detail: Shape-only local validation: real manifest verification is performed by npm run proof:deployment-smoke when beta env vars are present.

health_endpoint_passed.detail: No live hosted beta URL is available in local CI.

auth_negative_path_passed.detail: No live hosted beta URL and invalid-auth route check is available in local CI.

project_route_smoke_passed.detail: No live hosted beta project ID and auth token are available in local CI.

rollback_documented_or_tested.detail: Rollback procedure is documented; live rollback drill must be asserted only after it is actually performed.
